name: OpenCage Geocoder
description: OpenCage provides forward and reverse geocoding that aggregates multiple open data sources. Convert addresses to coordinates and coordinates to addresses, with rich annotations including timezone, currency, and geographic context for over 200 countries.

capabilities.name: geocode_forward
capabilities.description: Convert an address or place name into geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude).

capabilities.name: geocode_forward_abbreviated
capabilities.description: Forward geocode with abbreviated formatted output.

capabilities.name: geocode_forward_address_only
capabilities.description: Forward geocode excluding POI names from results, returning only addresses.

capabilities.name: geocode_forward_bounded
capabilities.description: Forward geocode within a specific bounding box to restrict results to a geographic area.

capabilities.name: geocode_forward_geojson
capabilities.description: Forward geocode returning results in GeoJSON format.

capabilities.name: geocode_forward_proximity
capabilities.description: Forward geocode biased toward a specific location for location-aware search.

capabilities.name: geocode_reverse
capabilities.description: Convert geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) into a human-readable address.

capabilities.name: geocode_reverse_roadinfo
capabilities.description: Reverse geocode with road information matching to the nearest road.

capabilities.name: ping
capabilities.description: Test API connectivity. Returns 'pong' if the service is available.
